summary: Dashboard loading state fails brand palette consistency and visual hierarchy requirements. Uses neutral gray backgrounds instead of diner palette, lacks proper brand treatment, and shows generic UI styling that contradicts the established diner aesthetic.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/white UI defaults instead of diner palette surfaces. Should use cream #fff8ea for cards and proper brand colors, not generic app chrome.
Logged-in dashboard surface uses completely different visual system from public routes, creating brand discontinuity immediately after signup/login.
Signed-in app chrome bleeds generic neutral styling that contradicts the requirement for visual separation while maintaining brand coherence.
Primary CTA button (Resend verification email) uses generic pink instead of proper diner pink #ffb3c7 with required border and shadow treatment.
CTA button lacks required .diner-button treatment with 2px ink border, hard shadow, and proper diner styling.

actions: Apply diner palette to dashboard surfaces - use cream #fff8ea for card backgrounds
Implement proper diner button treatment for verification email CTA
Ensure brand consistency between public and authenticated surfaces
Add proper borders and shadows per diner component requirements
Replace neutral gray backgrounds with brand-appropriate colors
